metaTitle: Export Table to Excel Online — Free | Tablesmit
metaDescription: Export any table to Excel (.xlsx) in one click. Build structured tables in Tablesmit and download clean Excel files instantly. Free, no signup required.
heroHeadline: Export any table to Excel in one click.
heroSubtext: Build your table, click Export, get a clean .xlsx file. Works with Excel, Google Sheets, and LibreOffice — any spreadsheet app.

benefits.heading: True .xlsx format
benefits.body: A genuine Excel file — not a CSV renamed. Column widths, header styles, and merged cells are preserved exactly as you built them.

benefits.heading: One click, no setup
benefits.body: Click the Excel button in the toolbar. The file downloads immediately. No account, no email, no waiting.

benefits.heading: Round-trip ready
benefits.body: Export to Excel, edit in your spreadsheet app, then import back into Tablesmit. Your data moves cleanly in both directions.

benefits.heading: Stays in your browser
benefits.body: The export runs entirely in your browser using SheetJS. Your data never leaves your machine. No server upload.

steps.heading: Build your table
steps.body: Set the number of rows and columns, add headers, and fill in your data. Set column types for proper formatting.

steps.heading: Style it
steps.body: Apply a theme, resize columns by dragging, merge cells if needed. The export reflects exactly what you see.

steps.heading: Click Excel
steps.body: Click the Excel button in the toolbar. Your .xlsx file downloads immediately — named after your table caption if you set one.

useCases: Exporting research data for further statistical analysis in Excel
Sharing structured tables with colleagues who use spreadsheet tools
Creating datasets for reports that require Excel as the delivery format
Building a table in Tablesmit and continuing work in Google Sheets
